positive: A stylized, symmetrical central arrangement featuring abstract mountain peaks merging with bioluminescent constellations. The composition should employ strong, clean silhouettes against a deep midnight blue and gradient purple sky. Key elements include stylized cedar and pine tree outlines reaching upward, integrated with crystalline starbursts and geometric cosmic patterns. The overall aesthetic should be minimalist yet impactful, suitable for a screen-printed apparel design. Use negative space effectively to define the shapes. Cinematic lighting, high contrast, perfect symmetry, vector art style, glowing light source from the constellations.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low resolution, watermark, text, writing, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, cluttered, cartoon, photographic, photorealistic, logo, signature, portrait, human
